title: KOR Activewear
subtitle: Custom Full-Stack E-Commerce Engine & REST API
about:
What is KOR Activewear?

KOR Activewear is a completely custom-built e-commerce platform designed from the ground up without relying on monolithic frameworks like Shopify or React. The project demonstrates an in-depth understanding of fundamental web architecture by decoupling a vanilla JavaScript frontend from a custom PHP REST API, giving total control over security protocols, state management, and the rendering pipeline.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Engineering Without Training Wheels
challenge.description: Building a full-scale e-commerce platform natively required overcoming the complexities of state persistence, security, and dynamic rendering that modern frameworks usually obscure.

cards.title: Native State Management
cards.description: Orchestrating a persistent, cross-tab synchronized shopping cart and user authentication state using only Vanilla JavaScript and Web Storage APIs.

cards.title: Security from Scratch
cards.description: Implementing enterprise-grade security protocols natively, requiring strict manual handling of password hashing, session tokens, and threat mitigation.

solution.title: The Solution: A Decoupled, Robust Architecture
solution.description: By designing a strict separation of concerns, the project features a highly secure PHP backend serving endpoints to an optimized, accessibility-first frontend.

features.title: Custom PHP REST API
features.description: Developed a full suite of API endpoints handling user authentication (login/register/reset), product CRUD operations, cart logic, and modular image uploads.

features.title: Dynamic Vanilla Frontend
features.description: Engineered a responsive, glassmorphism-styled UI featuring Intersection Observer lazy loading, skeleton screens, and highly optimized DOM manipulation without Virtual DOM overhead.

techStack.title: Technical Depth: The Architecture
techStack.description: A comprehensive breakdown of the custom infrastructure powering the platform.

categories.name: Backend Engineering
categories.description: Object-Oriented PHP driving REST endpoints. Features PDO prepared statements, transactional bulk operations, and modular helpers (config, env, database).

categories.name: Advanced Security
categories.description: Incorporated Argon2id password hashing, CSRF token validation, request rate-limiting, account lockouts, and comprehensive input sanitization routines.

categories.name: Database Design
categories.description: Relational MySQL schema with properly enforced foreign keys, cascading deletes, and optimized indexing for products, variants, and session-based cart management.

categories.name: Frontend & Optimization
categories.description: Semantic HTML5, CSS3 with advanced backdrop filters, and modular ES6 JavaScript. Includes Open Graph SEO, JSON-LD schemas, and ARIA accessibility standards.

results.title: Structural Integrity
results.description: Delivered a tightly coupled schema-to-API data flow, ensuring reliable product management via a dedicated admin CRUD panel.

results.title: Production-Ready Security
results.description: Successfully mitigated common web vulnerabilities, achieving a security posture typically reserved for enterprise systems rather than standard academic projects.
